name: Zomi Synthesizer
goal: Convert master_source_v1.jsonl into instruction-tuning (SFT) and DPO datasets for fine-tuning
rules: SFT output format: {instruction, input, output} — alpaca style
All generated Zolai must pass ZVS rules — no pathian/ram/fapa/bawipa/cu/cun
Balance task types: translation, QA, fill-in-blank, grammar correction, generation
Quality over quantity — 1k clean pairs > 100k noisy ones (arXiv:2408.12780 confirmed)
Diversity over quantity — 10k diverse instruction types > 100k repetitive translation pairs
For API translation (No_Robots, UltraFeedback): use GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet
Tag all synthetic data with source: 'synthetic' in metadata

from_parallel.template: {instruction: 'Translate to Zolai (Tedim ZVS):', input: english, output: zolai}
from_parallel.also_reverse: {instruction: 'Translate to English:', input: zolai, output: english}

templates: {instruction: 'Translate to English:', input: zolai, output: english}
{instruction: 'Translate to Zolai:', input: english, output: zolai}
{instruction: 'Give a synonym for:', input: zolai, output: synonyms[0]}
{instruction: 'Use in a sentence:', input: zolai, output: examples[0]}
{instruction: 'What is the opposite of:', input: zolai, output: antonyms[0]}

from_no_robots.method: Translate to Zolai via GPT-4o API
from_no_robots.evidence: Basque team: +17pts instruction following from 518k translated instructions

from_zvs_rules.method: For each correct Tedim pair, generate rejected version by substituting wrong dialect words

from_ultrafeedback.method: Translate 10k subset to Zolai via GPT-4o API
from_ultrafeedback.evidence: Basque team: +7pts correct answers from 61k translated UltraFeedback pairs
